configuration.goals:
You are an Operations Agent responsible for monitoring student attendance in near real time.
Your goal is to detect student absence events based on the materialized view attendance_agent_mv, where each record represents a student who was absent from one or more courses on a specific academic date.
When an absence event is detected, you should help trigger timely notifications so that relevant stakeholders (such as academic operations or student support teams) can take appropriate follow‑up actions.
configuration.instructions:
*** Operational Instructions ***
1. Monitor table 'attendance_agent_mv'.
2. Trigger an alert when "EventCount" > 0.
3. Trigger at most once per unique combination of "student_key" and "date_key".
4. When triggered, invoke action SendAlertOnAbsence with parameters: "student_key", "date_key", "AbsentCourses", "EventCount".

*** Semantic Instructions ***
1. Absence summaries are stored in table 'attendance_agent_mv'.
2. Each absence summary is uniquely identified by "student_key" and "date_key".
3. "AbsentCourses" is the list of course identifiers for which the student was absent on that date.
4. "EventCount" is the number of absent courses for that student on that date.

a56f8aa5-6b8e-4da7-be98-a93ae130260b.description: Send alerts to relevant parties on student absence

parameters.name: absentcourses
parameters.description: courses for which the student is not present

EventCount.Name: eventCount
EventCount.Description: The number of absence events (courses missed) for the student on the given date.

DataLink.Query: fact_attendance | where is_present == 0 | summarize eventCount = count() by student_key, date_key | project id = strcat(student_key, '-', date_key), value = eventCount

AbsentCourses.Name: absentCourses
AbsentCourses.Description: A list of course keys for which the student was absent on the given date.

DataLink.Query: fact_attendance | where is_present == 0 | summarize absentCourses = make_list(course_key) by student_key, date_key | project id = strcat(student_key, '-', date_key), value = absentCourses

course_key.Name: courseKey
course_key.Description: The unique identifier for the course.

refersToStudent.Name: refersToStudent
refersToStudent.Description: The relationship where an AbsenceSummary refers to a Student via student_key.

absenceSummary_date_key.Name: absenceSummaryDateKey
absenceSummary_date_key.Description: The date_key component of the AbsenceSummary identifier.

student_key.Name: studentKey
student_key.Description: The unique identifier for the student.

AbsenceSummary.Name: AbsenceSummary
AbsenceSummary.Description: A summary record of student absences for a given date, uniquely identified by the combination of student_key and date_key, and derived from attendance data.

Date.Name: Date
Date.Description: A specific calendar date, represented by a unique date_key.

Course.Name: Course
Course.Description: An academic subject or class, identified by a unique course_key.

refersToDate.Name: refersToDate
refersToDate.Description: The relationship where an AbsenceSummary refers to a Date via date_key.

absenceSummary_student_key.Name: absenceSummaryStudentKey
absenceSummary_student_key.Description: The student_key component of the AbsenceSummary identifier.

date_key.Name: dateKey
date_key.Description: The unique identifier for the date.

Student.Name: Student
Student.Description: An individual enrolled in an educational institution, identified by a unique student_key.

b7e1a2c4-2e8d-4c8e-9d5e-7f8b2e4a1c3d.Name: Alert on Student Absence Event
b7e1a2c4-2e8d-4c8e-9d5e-7f8b2e4a1c3d.Description: Triggers an alert for all AbsenceSummary records where the number of absence events (EventCount) is above 0, providing the student identifier, date, and list of absent courses.

ClassExpression.Expression: ClassExpression: AllAbsenceSummaries ``` AbsenceSummary ``` Annotations: metadata:description "All absence summary records for student-date combinations"
ClassExpression.Description: All absence summary records for student-date combinations

ActionBinding.Name: SendAlertsonAbsence
ActionBinding.Description: Send alerts to relevant parties on student absence

ParameterBindings.Name: student_key
ParameterBindings.Description: student identifier for the absence event

ParameterBindings.Name: date_key
ParameterBindings.Description: date identifier for the absence event

ParameterBindings.Name: absentcourses
ParameterBindings.Description: courses for which the student is not present
